subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath turned his face towards the Countenance and believed in God, the Single, the All-Informed. O Javád, hearken thou unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اقبل الی الوجه و آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر یا جواد ان استمع ندآء
